reviews.review_description: So far the game is great. Love everything about it so far but there are a few bugs that need to be fixed. When you go to move the hat rack or any rack the labels will float in mid air and you can’t place hats or any item in that location. And the second one is. When a customer gives you cash and you go to open the register a 20 will come out and you have the option to remove it but it don’t work. Hope the creators sees this and fixes the issue. Other than that the game is great. Good relaxing game to sit down and relax while playing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for playing our VR game and for sharing such detailed feedback - we really appreciate it!

We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game and finding it relaxing. About the issues you mentioned with the floating labels when moving racks and the cash register not working properly - thank you for pointing those out. Our team will definitely look into both bugs and fix them in the upcoming updates.

We also have some exciting new features and improvements coming in next week’s update that we think you’ll really enjoy!

Thanks again for your support, and we hope after the fixes and new content you’ll consider giving us a 5-star rating in the future. It really helps us improve and grow the game 🙏

Happy gaming! 🎮
